candidates.why: This is an explicit operating D&A line related to cost of revenues, but it appears to be a component of the selected parent COGS row 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. The amounts reconcile with 'Cost of Revenues - Unclassified' plus D&A components, so adding it separately would double count.

This is an explicit operating D&A line related to cost of revenues, but it appears to be embedded within the selected parent COGS row 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. The values reconcile as a component of total cost of revenues, so it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is '[Income Statement] Cost of Operating Revenue', which appears to be a parent/total row already including 'Amortization in Cost of Revenues' and 'Depreciation in Cost of Revenues'. Conservative no-double-counting treatment is to add no separate COGS D&A row.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is an explicit operating D&A line related to SG&A, but it appears to be a component within the selected parent row 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total'. The total approximately reconciles as SG&A unclassified + R&D + this depreciation line, so adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket is '[Income Statement] Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total', which appears to already include the separate SG&A depreciation line. Because R&D is also separately selected in XRD, and there is no explicit 'Amortization in R&D' row to treat specially, no separate XSGA D&A row should be added.
